content.query:
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_file_formats WHERE name = 'SynapseDelimitedTextFormatINOVALONENROLLMENT') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT [SynapseDelimitedTextFormatINOVALONENROLLMENT] 
	WITH ( FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT ,
	       FORMAT_OPTIONS (
			 FIELD_TERMINATOR = '|',
			 FIRST_ROW = 2,
			 USE_TYPE_DEFAULT = FALSE
			))
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_data_sources WHERE name = 'lexisnexis_deidstrgeaccdevelopment_dfs_core_windows_net') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE [lexisnexis_deidstrgeaccdevelopment_dfs_core_windows_net] 
	WITH (
		LOCATION = 'abfss://lexisnexis@deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net', 
		TYPE = HADOOP 
	)
GO

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE customer.ext_ino_treatment_enrollment_monthly_t (
	[memberuid] bigint,
	[monthbegindate] date,
	[monthenddate] date,
	[ageatendyear] bigint,
	[gendercode] nvarchar(200),
	[statecode] nvarchar(200),
	[zip3value] nvarchar(200),
	[raceethnicitycode] nvarchar(200),
	[payergroupcode] nvarchar(200),
	[payertypecode] nvarchar(200),
	[productcode] nvarchar(200),
	[medicalindicator] bigint,
	[rxindicator] bigint,
	[macontracttypecode] nvarchar(200),
	[groupplantypecode] nvarchar(200),
	[acaindicator] bigint,
	[acaissuerstatecode] nvarchar(200),
	[acagrandfatheredindicator] bigint,
	[acaonexchangeindicator] bigint,
	[acametallevel] nvarchar(200),
	[acaactuarialvalue] bigint,
	[sourceid] nvarchar(200),
	[createddate] date
	)
	WITH (
	LOCATION = '21537399/Inovalon/Inbound/treatment_consolidated_enrollment_monthly_combined.txt',
	DATA_SOURCE = [lexisnexis_deidstrgeaccdevelopment_dfs_core_windows_net],
	FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseDelimitedTextFormatINOVALONENROLLMENT]
	)
GO


SELECT TOP 1 * FROM customer.ext_ino_treatment_enrollment_monthly_t
where memberuid = 276681457

SELECT TOP 1 * FROM customer.stg_ino_treatment_enrollment_monthly_t
where memberuid = 276681457

select missing_category, count(*) from
appl.ino_treatment_tokens_w_missing_quasi_id_t
group by missing_category

select missing_category, count(*) from
appl.ino_control_tokens_w_missing_quasi_id_t
group by missing_category
